meaning: n.<美>(制白炽灯和真空管时使用的)杜美丝,铜包镍铁丝
examples: The wettability between the glass and dumet wire depends on both the cleanliness and constitution of surface layer and the heating conditions.
A snap ring is arranged at the underside of the inductive probe, takes a ring structure with a lateral opening and is made of dumet materials that have good heat conductivity.
